name: hillstone-fw-v5-5-r10
description: OctoBus package for Hillstone Firewall V5.5R10 login and address-book APIs.

HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10.HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10/.name: login
HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10.HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10/.description: Login to Hillstone FW V5.5R10 and cache the session.

HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10.HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10/.name: query-address-group
HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10.HILLSTONE_FW_V55R10/.description: Query a Hillstone address group by name.
